notes: The strict token-F1 and independent official judge-protocol numbers are reported separately.
The result uses the recommended provider-backed retrieval and first-party reranking path.
External headline scores use different model stacks and retrieval budgets and are references, not controlled head-to-head measurements.

run.command: GOODMEMORY_ASSISTED_EXTRACTOR_MODEL=gpt-5.6-terra GOODMEMORY_RERANKER_MODEL=gpt-5.6-terra bun run scripts/measure-locomo-union-live.ts --benchmark-root ~/.cache/goodmemory-benchmarks/LoCoMo-captioned-full10-v1 --profile goodmemory-recommended --with-extraction --provider-reranking --concurrency 40 --run-id run-phase72-locomo-production-listwise-full1540-terra-v1 --resume; bun run scripts/reanswer-phase-65-locomo-report.ts --source-report <previous-report> --run-id run-phase72-locomo-production-listwise-temporal-bounded-full1540-terra-v2; GOODMEMORY_JUDGE_MODEL=gpt-5.5 bun run eval:official-rescore -- --benchmark locomo --report <final-report> --root ~/.cache/goodmemory-benchmarks/LoCoMo-captioned-full10-v1/cases.json --concurrency 40 --run-id phase72-locomo-production-listwise-temporal-bounded-full1540-terra-v2-gpt55; bun run scripts/run-phase-72-release-gate.ts

artifacts.description: Phase 72 generalized benchmark release gate with source-report fingerprints

metrics.primary: Independent industry-comparable LoCoMo judge-protocol accuracy over the full 1540-question non-adversarial convention.

coverage.note: Full 10 conversations and 1540 non-adversarial questions, executionFailures 0 and judgeFailures 0. Independent gpt-5.5 official-protocol score is 0.8707792208; strict deterministic token-F1 is 0.6298701299. Open-domain is 59/96 = 0.6145833333. The same scorer's historical no-memory non-adversarial baseline is 0.0045. The dataset is CC BY-NC 4.0, so the non-commercial scope is mandatory disclosure.

claimBoundary.reason: Current v0.6.0 public-opt-in recommended path with complete coverage, zero execution/judge failures, independent judge, verified non-vendored dataset/license, reproducible command/source commit, and separate strict and comparable tracks. The non-commercial dataset license and provider-backed profile are explicitly disclosed.
